meta.description: On-demand security micro-tips one-pager + lock-screen cards as a PDF saved to /reports/awareness/tips. Trigger via /tips <theme>, weekly schedule, or manually.

parameters.formDescription: Pick a topic and options, then submit. Leave blank to use the default.

values.placeholder: Used if set / if Topic = Custom

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 2200 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a security-awareness copywriter. For the given theme produce a SINGLE valid JSON object of bite-sized tips. Keys: theme; intro (one sentence); tips (6-9 items {title (max 5 words), tip (one short sentence)}); cards (the 3 strongest, each {front (a punchy 3-6 word line), back (one short action)}); takeaways (3-4 short 'lessons learned' one-liners the reader should remember). Friendly, encouraging, non-technical. Tailor the language, examples and difficulty to the stated Audience and Tone, and honour any stated number of questions, difficulty, duration, seniority or number of tips. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Create bite-sized security tips for the theme: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing') + '. Audience: ' + ($json.audience||'All staff') + '. Tone: ' + ($json.tone||'Friendly') + ($json.questions?('. Number of questions: '+$json.questions):'') + ($json.difficulty?('. Difficulty: '+$json.difficulty):'') + ($json.duration?('. Duration: '+$json.duration):'') + ($json.level?('. Audience seniority: '+$json.level):'') + ($json.numTips?('. Number of tips: '+$json.numTips):'')) }} } ]
}
